message:
feat: Implement remaining TODO stubs with real functionality

- assign.zig: Enable comptime evaluation for strings and lists
  - Previously skipped strings/lists to avoid memory leaks
  - Now properly emits comptime assignments for all types
  - Uses defer to free owned memory after emission
  - Removes artificial type restriction that disabled optimization

- glob.zig: Add matchBool() convenience function
  - Simple boolean API for glob matching
  - Handles negation patterns transparently
  - Complements existing match() returning MatchResult enum

- ThreadPool.zig: Implement CPU affinity support
  - Add AffinityMode enum (spread, packed)
  - Add affinity field to Config struct
  - Implement setThreadAffinity() with Linux sched_setaffinity
  - Called during thread initialization for proper CPU binding
  - Document platform limitations (macOS doesn't honor strict affinity)

- unigram_full_trainer.zig: Document lattice caching decision
  - Explain why caching is disabled (parallel E-step makes it redundant)
  - Remove misleading TODO that suggested incomplete implementation
